scripts.build: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build:tauri
scripts.test:prepare: pnpm run build:icon && pnpm run copy:assets:tauri && pnpm run build --no-bundle
scripts.dev:tauri: pnpm run build:icon && pnpm run copy:assets:tauri && cross-env IS_CLEAN=true tauri dev
scripts.dev:ios: pnpm run copy:assets:mobile && RUSTC_WRAPPER= cross-env IS_IOS=true pnpm tauri ios dev --features mobile
scripts.dev:android: pnpm run copy:assets:mobile && cross-env IS_ANDROID=true pnpm tauri android dev --features mobile
scripts.build:android: pnpm run build:icon && pnpm run copy:assets:mobile && cross-env IS_CLEAN=true pnpm tauri android build -- --no-default-features --features mobile
scripts.build:ios: pnpm run build:icon && pnpm run copy:assets:mobile && cross-env IS_IOS=true pnpm tauri ios build -- --no-default-features --features mobile
scripts.build:ios:device: pnpm run build:icon && pnpm run copy:assets:mobile && cross-env IS_IOS=true pnpm tauri ios build -- --no-default-features --features mobile --export-method debugging
scripts.build:tauri:win32: pnpm run download:bin && pnpm run build:cli && pnpm tauri build
scripts.build:tauri:linux: pnpm run download:bin && pnpm run build:cli && NO_STRIP=1 ./src-tauri/build-utils/shim-linuxdeploy.sh pnpm tauri build && ./src-tauri/build-utils/buildAppImage.sh
scripts.build:tauri:darwin: pnpm run download:bin && pnpm run build:mlx-server && pnpm run build:cli && pnpm tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin
scripts.build:tauri: pnpm run build:icon && pnpm run copy:assets:tauri && run-script-os
scripts.build:tauri:plugin:api: cd src-tauri/plugins && pnpm install && pnpm -r run build
scripts.build:core: cd core && pnpm run build && pnpm pack --out package.tgz
scripts.build:extensions: rimraf ./pre-install/*.tgz || true && pnpm --filter @janhq/core run build && cd extensions && pnpm install --no-frozen-lockfile && cd .. && run-script-os
